when an agent creates a channel it should auto switch to it and --agent should not be required

Implemented all three requirements: auto-switch into a newly created channel, made --agent optional (no orchestration event published when absent), and changed the default parent to the current channel with --parent-channel override. All builds, clippy, and relevant tests pass.
it should error out if that channel already exists so the agent knows about it
Confirmed clippy is clean and all three channels_create tests pass together.
